description: Business entity (LLC) with three members undergoing standard CDD, no beneficial ownership threshold breach
parsed_text:
KYC / CDD ENTITY ONBOARDING FORM
Legal Entity Name: Cascade Ridge Ventures LLC
Customer Type: Business
EIN: XX-XXX4302
State of Formation: Oregon
Date of Formation: 2019-03-14
Principal Business Address: 3410 SW Morrison Street, Portland, OR 97205, USA
Phone: (503) 555-0174   Email: operations@cascaderidge.example
Business Activity: Commercial real estate management and leasing
NAICS Code: 531120
Source of Funds: Rental income and property sale proceeds
Expected Monthly Activity: $142,000

MEMBERSHIP / OWNERSHIP STRUCTURE
Member 1: Thomas Wren — Ownership: 35%
Member 2: Cora Lundqvist — Ownership: 35%
Member 3: Pacific Crest Holdings Inc — Ownership: 30%
No single member meets or exceeds the 25% beneficial ownership threshold for natural-person reporting on a standalone basis when accounting for indirect interests; however, under internal policy, all members with 25% or greater direct interest have been identified. Beneficial ownership certifications collected from Thomas Wren and Cora Lundqvist. A control person, Marcus Delacroix (Managing Member), has been identified and certified.

IDENTITY DOCUMENTS COLLECTED
Thomas Wren — Driver License: DL-OR-XX8841, Exp: 2027-09-30
Cora Lundqvist — Passport: P-XXXX7703, Exp: 2028-06-15
Marcus Delacroix (Control Person) — Driver License: DL-OR-XX5519, Exp: 2026-11-22

RISK ASSESSMENT
PEP Status: No PEP associations identified for any member or control person.
Sanctions Screening: Clear. No OFAC SDN or consolidated list matches.
Adverse Media: No adverse media found.
High-Risk Indicators: None. Entity operates domestically, revenue is traceable to recorded lease agreements.
CDD Level: Standard
Risk Rating: Low

COMPLIANCE NOTES
Articles of Organization reviewed and on file. Operating Agreement reviewed — consistent with stated ownership percentages. Business license (City of Portland) verified. CDD questionnaire completed by Managing Member. No EDD triggers identified.
Review Date: 2025-06-10   Reviewer: Sandra Okonkwo
